items.summary: In backend/main.mo, update the stable owner principal variable to the exact text value 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe'. This must be set using Principal.fromText("q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe") in the stable var initializer. All hasPermission checks for the #owner role must compare the caller against this principal. Remove any previously hardcoded principal value. Do not rely on a roles TrieMap entry for owner — the owner check must be a direct equality comparison against this stable var so it cannot be overwritten.

In backend/main.mo, ensure that all inventory endpoints (createPart, getPart, listParts, updatePart, deletePart, usePartOnJob) correctly accept calls from principals with at minimum the #authorized role, and also from the #owner principal. Verify the hasPermission guard on every inventory function uses the updated owner principal so the owner can perform all inventory CRUD operations.
